'''daracha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seacoast|seacoast]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seacoast|seacoast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| daracha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dæræchæth|dæræchæth]] || [[word:dæræchæj|dæræchæj]] || [[word:dæræchæsh|dæræchæsh]] || [[word:dæræchæ|dæræchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dararachath|dararachath]] || [[word:dararachaj|dararachaj]] || [[word:dararachash|dararachash]] || [[word:dararacha|dararacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:darachath|darachath]] || [[word:darachaj|darachaj]] || [[word:darachash|darachash]] || [[word:daracha|daracha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:darafchath|darafchath]] || [[word:darafchaj|darafchaj]] || [[word:darafchash|darafchash]] || [[word:darafchaf|darafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:darachatha|darachatha]] || [[word:darachaja|darachaja]] || [[word:darachasha|darachasha]] || [[word:darachaka|darachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:darachath|darachath]] || [[word:darachaj|darachaj]] || [[word:darachash|darachash]] || [[word:daracha|daracha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:darachathal|darachathal]] || [[word:darachajal|darachajal]] || [[word:darachashal|darachashal]] || [[word:darachakal|darachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:darachathatha|darachathatha]] || [[word:darachajaja|darachajaja]] || [[word:darachashasha|darachashasha]] || [[word:darachaka|darachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:darachathan|darachathan]] || [[word:darachajan|darachajan]] || [[word:darachashan|darachashan]] || [[word:darachakan|darachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:darachathaoro|darachathaoro]] || [[word:darachajaoro|darachajaoro]] || [[word:darachashaoro|darachashaoro]] || [[word:darachakaoro|darachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
